subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou by Whose voice all in the kingdom of creation are enraptured, by the fragrance of Whose garment every ignorant one attaineth unto the ocean of knowledge
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من بندائک انجذبت الاشیاء فی ملکوت الانشاء و بعرف قمیصک بلغ کل جاهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
